title: pipsqueakSMP - Server Texture Pack
description: This is the texturepack for the Minecraft server pipsqueakSMP!
body:
This texturepack was made for the Minecraft server **pipsqueaksmp**!
In this texturepack, there are paintings of Emma Myers! (Pip in AGGGTM)
You can find Emma's cat too in the world, Gorby!

So if you love Emma Myers and Pip this texture pack is for you!
You can use this in your own Minecraft server too.
